text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm walking down the hallway...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ines! I knew I could count on you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Your Bakushin slides across the floor applied the
wax so evenly... It was like watching art in motion!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Come on, you're exaggerating for sure! I'm just
used to this kind of work from my cleaning job.
That's all.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I see! However, as class representative, etiquette
dictates that I must return the favor! Please allow
me to show my gratitude somehow!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Heh. Well, if you insist, then... I want you to
come with me to a supermarket sale!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: But of course! I will gladly accompany you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later on, during a stroll through the school
grounds...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The probability of Ines being a cyborg has
increased to forty-five percent.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh?! All I did was slice up a carrot.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Affirmative. However, the thickness and diameter
of the carrot slices are numerically identical.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, so that's what you meant. Well, I guess all
those food prep jobs must have honed my
skills! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
So your precision is the result of consistent
practice. Understood. Cyborg probability has
fallen to zero percent.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. Now I can eat a nutritious meal that
reflects the data perfectly.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
No prob! Call me anytime you need a hand! Using
a food processor can be, um, kinda tricky!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
You suuure know how to do a thorough cleat
check, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
My cleats are pretty unique, you know. Even the
professionals have a hard time with them.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
They're definitely an interesting pair... but don't
you worry! I've dealt with a huge range of
customers at one of my regular gigs!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, it sounds like all the staff at your store
must be experts. Maybe I'll drop by sometime!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ding, dong... ♪ This just in—I've got a juicy tip
for any prospective customers!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
If you purchase a pair of cleats today... you'll be
eligible for a fifty percent discount on a second
pair! Wow! Be sure to take advantage of this
special offer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Haha, you really know how to upsell.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm just recognizing demand and making sure
we supply it, that's all. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During a training session some time later, I'm
talking with Ines Fujin about all the good deeds I
saw her doing around school today.
choice_data_list: So many people rely on you.
So many people rely on you.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Is that a compliment? C'mon, don't stop with just
one!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Juuust kidding! Haha.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: The truth is, I'm doing this for my own sake too.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Helping others helps me!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
The person who gets helped is happy. The person
who helps is happy. Smiles all around!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: It's two birds with one stone! At that point, why would I not want to help people?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I know people worry about me wearing
myself out, but...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'm the type that thrives off of seeing people
smile!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
So that's why, if it means I can help others out,
then I don't mind working my butt off.
choice_data_list: That must really build up your stamina.
That must really build up your stamina.
You must learn a lot from all of your jobs.
You must learn a lot from all of your jobs.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
So that's why, if it means I can help others out,
then I don't mind working my butt off.
choice_data_list: That must really build up your stamina.
That must really build up your stamina.
You must learn a lot from all of your jobs.
You must learn a lot from all of your jobs.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, yeah! You're right on the mark! I feel like I
have gotten a stamina boost recently!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Wait, maybe I'm hitting three birds with one stone?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Talk about efficiency! I suddenly feel super
motivated! There's no stopping me now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now more motivated than ever, Ines Fujin vows to
remain a do-gooder.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that's right! So, the other day, I helped the
student council with their paperwork!
choice_data_list: Is there anything you won't do?!
Is there anything you won't do?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
It just kind of happened, you know? But anyway,
we got to talking over our coffee break, and the
council members had so much insight to offer
about racing!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Being able to casually show my face here and
there is just another perk of helping out! ♪
